title: Joins, Cardinality, Unmatched Rows, and Fanout Control
description: Ticket, team, owner, and event data must be combined without losing unassigned work or multiplying effort totals. Learners cumulatively produce a cardinality-safe support investigation through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Write explicit inner joins from relationship predicates and predict result cardinality before execution.
Use left, right, or full outer-join reasoning to retain required unmatched entities.
Model and query many-to-many relationships through an associative relation with its own grain.
